name: Portrait Memorial AI Design System
description: Premium Memorial aesthetic designed to be respectful, calm, and high-quality.

primaryTextAccent.name: Deep warm brown/stone
primaryTextAccent.usage: Used for primary buttons, active states, and main headings.

secondaryText.name: Warm gray
secondaryText.usage: Used for descriptions and secondary labels.

tertiaryText.name: Light gray
tertiaryText.usage: Used for placeholders or disabled states.

headings.usage: Used for main headings (e.g., '영정사진 제작 시작').

body.usage: Default body text to ensure readability.

primary.styles: bg-[#52453C] text-white hover:bg-[#3f352e] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors

standard.styles: bg-white border border-[#e7e5e4] rounded-xl shadow-sm p-4 options-card
bg-[#fdfcf8] border border-[#e7e5e4] rounded-xl focus:border-[#52453C] focus:outline-none placeholder-[#a8a29e]

animation.description: Use subtle fades. Avoid flashy or rapid movements. Everything should feel 'calm'.
